title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Dr Maalpani meets a businessman and plans to make a high-profile transaction with him. The man turns out to be a swindler.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Dr Hathi finds himself in trouble as the black marketers of medicines corner him and overhear his conversation with Popatlal.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Popatlal disguises himself in a desperate effort to meet Dr Maalpani, but he is left baffled after finding out that Dr Maalpani has left.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: After failing to perform a sting operation on the black marketers, Popatlal decides to give it another shot with Jethalal at the helm of the operation.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Popatlal tells Jethalal that Rang Tarang Resort needs 200 TVs and refrigerators for its rooms. Jethalal becomes ecstatic at the prospect of getting this huge order.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: On Popatlal's insistence, Jethalal decides to leave for the resort as per their plan. He also takes Bagha and Champaklal along for support.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal sets off for the resort. Popatlal rings to enquire about his whereabouts, but the former plays a prank on him.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: As Popatlal and Bharti eagerly wait for Jethalal to touch down at the resort, they believe that a waiter is keeping an eye on them. Jethalal and Champaklal enjoy the journey to the resort.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal finally arrives at the resort. Popatlal feels upset when he realises that Champaklal and Bagha have tagged along.

subTitle: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Panic spreads among Gokuldham's men after Champaklal gets his hands on the alcohol, worrying everyone.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The men in Gokuldham face trouble as Champaklal announces to punish them, but they eventually learn that the latter decides to forgive everyone.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Bhide finds a way to avoid promising his wife he will not drink in future. Dr Hathi pretends to be asleep to avoid making a similar promise to his wife.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: When Iyer expresses his desire to take a selfie, Jethalal decides to prank him. The residents of Gokuldham participate in a boat race.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The residents of Gokuldham let their hair down and compete in a boat race before checking out of the resort.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Taarak confides in Jethalal about his fight with Anjali. However, when Jethalal and Daya plan a dinner to cheer Taarak up, he refuses to come.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Taarak has a fight with Anjali, but they sort it out after coming back home.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Taarak tells Jethalal that he had a fight with Anjali earlier. Daya helps in trying to make him feel better.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The women of Gokuldham try to find an effective solution to their expensive problem. A mysterious guest shows up after Daya's disappearance.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Anjali decides to buy an idol for her relative and heads to the shop, but she is surprised to see the other women there.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Tapu Sena are feeling bored as they have nothing to play in the clubhouse, but Popatlal promises he will give them games and things he plans to throw away.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Daya has a plan with her friend. Tapu pranks Jethalal. Madhavi and Bhide try to start the scooter so they can drop Sonu off.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: When two junk men come to the society, Tapu Sena have to decide whom to sell their scraps and Bhide's scooter to. Popatlal is impressed by Tapu Sena's commitment.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The residents are surprised by how much profit Tapu and his friends have made by selling scraps after they go around the society and brag about it.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Bhide finds out that Tapu has sold his scooter and gets very upset. Daya learns of the news and has to help Tapu retrieve the scooter.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Tapu apologises to Bhide for selling his scooter and asks to be punished. Two thieves steal Bhide's scooter. Tapu Sena go missing.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal goes looking for Bhide's scooter in order to return it to him. However, the thieves are planning on selling it.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The residents are tired of waiting helplessly for the scooter and decide to take matters into their own hands, but Jethalal finally comes back with it. However, Bhide doubts it is really his.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Sharman Joshi and Boman Irani are still searching for the scooter. Bhide finds Abdul with his scooter. Jethalal explains how he got the scooter.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Bhide takes his scooter out for a ride and gets into an accident. Everyone tries to talk him out of using the scooter.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Bhide learns that his uncle is coming over and wants Madhavi to prepare lunch for him. Madhavi goes to Komal's place.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Bhide's relatives visit just as he finds himself locked out of his own home. Faced with an embarrassing situation, Bhide asks Sodhi to break the door down.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Champaklal tries to stop Jethalal from eating junk food and ruining his health. Bagha approaches Jethalal and informs him that he has not signed an important cheque.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Champaklal informs Daya about a recent jewellery theft near Gokuldham. Their own safety is threatened when a thief breaks into Jethalal's house and points a gun at them.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: When everyone leaves for work early in the morning, Bhide struggles to start his scooter. Sodhi arrives and asks for a lift on Sakharam to his garage.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Two con artists, Vicky and Mona, come up with a plan to rob Gokuldham Society. Mona knocks on every door, introducing herself as Daya's friend.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Vicky and Mona's scheme to rob Gokuldham Society unfolds flawlessly. Mona infiltrates Jethalal's home, targeting Daya's valuables.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: When Vicky and Mona reach a critical point in their Gokuldham Society heist, Popatlal unexpectedly spots them in the compound.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Vicky and Mona successfully carry out their plan to rob Gokuldham Society, managing to escape with the stolen jewellery.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Everyone in Gokuldham faces a harrowing ordeal as thieves make off with valuables in broad daylight. The police arrive at the society to conduct a thorough investigation into the circumstances surrounding the crime.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Abdul apprehends the jewellery thieves as they attempt to flee and returns them to Gokuldham. The police arrive to make arrests, but Inspector Pandey appears disgruntled.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal learns about the robbery and praises Inspector Pandey for catching the robbers. Bhide and Popatlal receive gifts from a mysterious benefactor.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Sanjana is in for a shock as Popatlal confesses his love for her in public. She eventually finds herself at a loss of words to respond to him.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Sanjana speaks with Popatlal over the phone and professes her love for him. She promises to introduce him to her father and requests him to meet her at the reception.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Bagha, Jethalal and Champaklal try to turn the tables on Sanjana to free Popatlal. The trio is shocked as Sanjana refuses to budge.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: As Sanjana talks to her boss about their plan, Jethalal, Champaklal and Bagha overhear her. The trio confronts Sanjana about her intentions.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal, Champaklal and Bagha find themselves in trouble when the black marketers realise their true identity and try to chase them down.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Popatlal finds himself at a major risk of being electrocuted and starts to panic. Jethalal becomes disguised and looks for Popatlal.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: While Jethalal, Bagha and Champaklal are on the run from the black marketers, the police decide to intervene by visiting the resort.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The black marketers find themselves in trouble when they see police officers waiting outside the resort. They try to laugh their way out to little avail.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal, Champaklal and Bagha are worried as the police threaten to arrest them. The police inspector threatens to hand them a strict punishment.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Chaos ensues as Inspector Pandey and his team begin to find Popatlal's belongings in the resort. Everyone realises that the sting operation has failed.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Inspector Pandey confronts Madanlal and accuses him of being a black marketer. Jethalal and Champaklal intervene and plead Madanlal's innocence.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal, Champaklal and Bagha are shocked as Madanlal taunts them about their inability to bring him to justice. He leaves the resort with Inspector Pandey's permission.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal, Champaklal and Bagha cannot believe their ears when Inspector Pandey declares the mission a success.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Bhide grows uncomfortable after watching Tapu and his friends dance together. Tapu tries to convince him to join them.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Anjali and Taarak ponder Popatlal's marital future. The kids in Gokuldham Society introduce a new game for Champaklal.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Madhavi and Bhide argue about her cooking. The men of the Gokuldham Society gather at Abdul's soda shop.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal upsets Popatlal with a negative comment about his marriage. An unknown person starts playing the violin in Gokuldham Society.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Popatlal discovers a matchmaker called Vinu Kaka and gets excited to get advice about his marriage prospects.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Popatlal asks Jethalal what he thinks about the advice Vinu Kaka gave him. Bhide feels very worried after Vinu Kaka sees something bad in Sonu's hand.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Popatlal visits Gada Electronics for help. Babita and Anjali encourage him to change his name for his luck with women.

subTitle: Taarak wants to finish writing his article, but in a society like Gokuldham, he ends up facing many unwelcome interruptions.

subTitle: Jethalal finds himself in the midst of another crisis at Gokuldham.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal is eager to eat a delicious feast prepared by Daya. However, an electricity issue quickly ruins his dinner plans.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal heads to Babita and Iyer's house to handle the tube light issue. However, trouble arises when Jethalal lands in a tricky situation.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Dr Hathi arrives to check on Jethalal, who appears to be in shock. Everyone learns about Jethalal's bizarre phobia.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal's trauma increases when he sees terrifying dreams involving electricity. Champaklal asks the others to help him help Jethalal.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: A sudden power cut leaves all of Gokuldham Society in shambles. However, Jethalal has no problems with the lack of electricity.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The society members celebrate when Jethalal overcomes his fear of electricity and turns on the lights of the flats in a bid to save Daya.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The women of the Gokuldham Society organise a traditional ceremony, but their husbands are reluctant to stay awake all night.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: As the women prepare for the ceremony and try to persuade their husbands to join, Taarak astounds them with a surprise.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Gokuldham Society's men join the ladies and Tapu Sena for a ceremony and compete in a game of antakshari.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Bhide organises a meeting for Gokuldham Society's anniversary, but the residents disagree on plans. Tapu and his friends eventually come up with an ideal solution.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Comedian Raju Srivastav joins Gokuldham Society's anniversary celebration with the cast and crew of `Teree Sang: A Kidult Love Story'.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Raju Srivastav delivers a captivating stand-up performance during Gokuldham Society's anniversary celebration.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal begins the year happily by seeing Babita. Bhide ruins his mood by demanding payment of the maintenance bill.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: People gather at Jethalal's store when they begin selling a brand new phone. Tapu asks Jethalal to reserve one of them for him.

subTitle: Popatlal tries to cancel the fitness camp that everyone is excited about. Jethalal and the others strongly oppose Popatlal's actions.

subTitle: Bhide and Iyer face a dilemma when Sodhi tells them that the drinks are gone, leading to everyone panicking.

subTitle: Jethalal visits an alcohol store and purchases a few drinks for himself and his friends. He eventually finds himself in trouble when Champaklal and Bagha question him about it.

subTitle: Bagha and Champaklal confront Jethalal about the bag. Feeling cornered, Jethalal quickly fabricates a story to cover up the truth.

subTitle: Champaklal asks Bagha to find a tumbler for the decoction. Upon hearing the request, Jethalal panics.

subTitle: Jethalal becomes speechless after Champaklal enters his room and starts asking about the bag that contains the decoction.

subTitle: Everyone is mad after knowing that Bhide forgot the chief guest's shawl before the function. They eventually mock him about the matter.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Popatlal recounts the team's hardships during the celebration. Everyone present appreciates the team's efforts in overcoming these challenges.

subTitle: As the residents of Gokuldham continue to celebrate the success of the mission, the resort manager greets them with a shawl as a token of appreciation.

subTitle: All of the Gokuldham men plan to escape from the resort, leaving their family members behind, in order to organise a secret party.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Determined to hide their secret, the Gokuldham men mix their alcohol into the soft drink. However, trouble ensues when Bagha drinks it after he eats his paneer chilli.

subTitle: Jethalal and his friends begin to fear the worst when Bagha drinks the entire bottle of alcohol in one go. They eventually notice a change in Bagha's behaviour.

subTitle: The residents of Gokuldham attend Popatlal's name-changing ceremony. Popatlal cries because he does not want to change his name.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The people of Gokuldham Society submit their ideas for Popatlal's new name and cast their votes.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal tries to recommend various names that begin with P for Popatlal. Madhavi calls Vinu Kaka to approve of the new name.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal tries to think of a new name beginning with the letter P for Popatlal. Bawri suggests a name that everyone loves.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Popatlal changes his name to Pyaare and convinces everyone to call him by his new name. Madhavi believes that Popatlal's new name will bring him good luck.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Pyaarelal doubts his name change, but Anjali shares news of a marriage prospect. Taarak decides to stay in the house all day.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Taarak gets permission to leave work after telling his boss about Pyaarelal's single life. Pyaarelal meets his potential bride, but her family prefer his old name.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: While talking to Jethalal, Taarak gets very emotional about the food Anjali makes him eat daily. Carrying the tiffin he was trying to avoid, he comes up with a plan to deal with it.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Anjali is furious that Taarak has been giving away her home-cooked meals to strangers. She calls a meeting with all the men of Gokuldham to make a decision.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Anjali is upset and deeply hurt to see Taarak eating a heavy breakfast with the Gadas. Champaklal supports Taarak until Anjali tells him about what Taarak did with her home-made meals.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: While Anjali goes out of town for a day, Jethalal plans an elaborate feast for Taarak. In order to avoid eating diet food cooked by Daya, Taarak fakes being ill. Anjali finds out and gets tensed.

subTitle: Jethalal asks Natu Kaka and Bagha to bring food to Taarak. They eventually land in trouble when Goli spots them.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Sodhi's news of Anjali's homecoming creates an uproar. The men try to hide themselves in the kitchen, and Taarak attempts to divert Anjali's attention from the smell.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The women become angry upon realising their husbands' dishonesty and plot revenge. Daya recommends a clever approach to eradicate the rat from Taarak's kitchen.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: When Anjali tries to walk away, Taarak persuades her with a song and promises to obey her. Meanwhile, Tapu Sena is excited to bring Lord Ganesha to Gokuldham society.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: When Champaklal's feet hurt, Jethalal and Tapu fight over helping him. Later, Jethalal feels embarrassed in front of Babita.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Popatlal's phone stops functioning and he tries various techniques to fix the problem. Later, he decides to purchase a smartphone from Jethalal's store.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Popatlal is keen on buying his new phone as per the auspicious time given by the priest. At the shop, he harasses Jethalal over selecting the phone.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: While Popatlal thinks he has lost his phone, Jethalal has it and plans to play a prank. Later, he uses Popatlal's phone to send weird text messages to the women of the society.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The messages that the women of Gokuldham Society get from Popatlal end up instigating them against their husbands.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Following Jethalal's prank in the Gokuldham society, there is mayhem in the lives of all his married friends.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: When Pandey says that the culprit is an insider, everyone is very eager to know his name. Hearing this, Jethalal begins to worry about himself and tries to defuse the situation.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal is saddened when he sees that everyone in the Gokuldham society except him is taking a day off work.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal's angst hits the limit when Bagha asks for a day off from Gada Electronics to go on a date with Bawri.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: All the members of Gokuldham society are excited to welcome Daya's mother as they gear up for celebrations.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal, with a bucket in hand, slyly makes his way to Taarak's house to get some warm water. On the other hand, Taarak asks Abdul to buy him some delicious breakfast in Anjali's absence.

subTitle: Chaos ensues when Dr Hathi arrives in a tempo and is unable to get off of it. Babita gets excited about her birthday but is disappointed when Iyer cannot celebrate with her.
